name: Han Fang
body:
### Welcome to Han Fang's GitHub Pages.
Han Fang received his M.S. in Applied Math & Statistics at Stony Brook University (SBU) and received his B.S. in Optical Informatics at Sun Yat-sen University. He is currently supervised by [Dr. Gholson Lyon](http://lyonlab.labsites.cshl.edu/) and [Dr. Michael Schatz](http://schatzlab.cshl.edu/) at [Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory](http://www.cshl.edu/). He is interested in genomics, human genetics and algorithm development.

### Education
- 2013-Present, Ph.D in **Applied Math & Stat.** at Stony Brook University
- 2011-2013, M.S. in **Applied Math & Stat.** at Stony Brook University
- 2007-2011, B.S. in **Optical Informatics** at Sun Yat-sen University

### Publications
- **Fang, H.**, Narzisi, G., O’Rawe, J. A., Wu, Y., Rosenbaum, J., Ronemus, M., Iossifov, I., Schatz, M. C.*, Lyon, G. J.* (2014). Reducing INDEL calling errors in whole-genome and exome sequencing. Submitted. ([View PDF](http://biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2014/06/10/006148.full.pdf))
- Narzisi, G., O’Rawe, J. A., Iossifov, **Fang, H.**, I., Lee, Y., Wang, Z., Wu, Y., Lyon, G. J., Wigler, M., Schatz, M. C. (2014). Accurate detection of de novo and transmitted INDELs within exome-capture data using micro-assembly. To be appear in Nature Methods. ([View PDF](http://biorxiv.org/content/early/2014/06/18/001370.full.pdf))
- O’Rawe J. A., **Fang H.**, Rynearson S., Robison R., Kiruluta E. S., Higgins G., Eilbeck K., Reese M. G., Lyon G. J.*,Integrating precision medicine in the study and clinical treatment of a severely mentally ill person. PeerJ (2013) DOI 10.7717/peerj.177 ([View PDF](https://peerj.com/articles/177.pdf))

### Contact Information
Email: hanfang.cshl@gmail.com

Twitter: [@Han_Fang_](https://twitter.com/Han_Fang_)
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
